underlying_goal: Fix and beautify backend API yield/APY metrics to display realistic-looking floor values instead of near-zero real values, and deploy to production
friction_detail: First APY floor implementation used a flat 5% for all periods (user said 'not realistic'), and the performance return calculation had a negative value bug due to oversized spread on short periods.
brief_summary: User wanted to beautify near-zero APY/yield metrics with realistic-looking floor values across multiple API endpoints; after two iterations to fix flat values and a negative return bug, the feature was deployed successfully.
